ac_device.title: Select SPOT Device
ac_device.description: Choose the LifeSmart SPOT device you want to configure as an A/C remote.

ac_brand.title: Select A/C Brand
ac_brand.description: Choose the air conditioner brand for the selected SPOT device.

ac_remote.title: Select Remote Profile
ac_remote.description: Choose the remote profile index returned by the LifeSmart A/C API.

ac_remove.title: Remove SPOT A/C Remote
ac_remove.description: Choose the configured SPOT A/C remote you want to remove.
